summary: RE: https:// mas.to/@fragmented/11603941510 3907028 agent skills are the most powerful construct for AI coding today. it's the quickest way to get better results with less context bloat. but with great power comes responsibility... they can become a prompt injection vector. this episode is a crash course on agent skills! 🎧
content:
RE: https://mas.to/@fragmented/116039415103907028

agent skills are the most powerful construct for AI coding today. it's the quickest way to get better results with less context bloat.

but with great power comes responsibility... they can become a prompt injection vector.

this episode is a crash course on agent skills! 🎧
